4:T57a,(function(){var PARAM='__pd_reload';var KEY='privatedao-next-asset-recovery:'+(window.location.pathname||'/');function nextAsset(url){return typeof url==='string'&&url.indexOf('/_next/static/')!==-1;}function once(){try{if(window.sessionStorage.getItem(KEY)==='1'){return false;}window.sessionStorage.setItem(KEY,'1');return true;}catch(_){return true;}}function hardReload(){if(!once()){return;}var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.set(PARAM,String(Date.now()));window.location.replace(url.toString());}function maybeRecover(value){var message='';if(typeof value==='string'){message=value;}else if(value&&typeof value.message==='string'){message=value.message;}else if(value&&typeof value.reason==='string'){message=value.reason;}if(message.indexOf('ChunkLoadError')!==-1||message.indexOf('Loading CSS chunk')!==-1||message.indexOf('Failed to fetch dynamically imported module')!==-1){hardReload();}}window.addEventListener('error',function(event){var target=event.target;if(target&&nextAsset(target.src||target.href)){hardReload();}},true);window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection',function(event){maybeRecover(event.reason);});if(window.location.search.indexOf(PARAM+'=')!==-1){window.addEventListener('load',function(){var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.delete(PARAM);window.history.replaceState(window.history.state,'',url.toString());},{once:true});}})();0:{"P":null,"c":["","viewer","authority-transfer-runbook",""],"q":"","i":false,"f":[[["",{"children":["viewer",{"children":[["slug","authority-transfer-runbook","c",null],{"children":["__PAGE__",{}]}]}]},"$undefined","$undefined",16],[["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","link","0",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/02zo295tzj_7w.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","link","1",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/11s0gjiai6hjq.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0og9v~0.wbgel.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0c3rgjc-0fe3r.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0f6kvf~_~fcr7.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/01v-109x2_k5o.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0i.l9589uvx0j.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-5",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0sr6f3rgdkukk.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-6",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/10_9opwzz0v93.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-7",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0j4pbljnny6-v.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]],["$","html",null,{"lang":"en","className":"space_grotesk_d7b50fc5-module__qeW00a__variable 20:["$","div",null,{"ref":"$undefined","className":"rounded-[28px] border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(12,16,30,0.92),rgba(8,10,22,0.96))] shadow-[0_20px_80px_rgba(0,0,0,0.28)] backdrop-blur mt-10","children":["$","div",null,{"ref":"$undefined","className":"p-6 sm:p-8","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6","children":[["$","$1","block-0",{"children":["$","h1","h1-2",{"className":"text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-4xl","children":"Authority Transfer Runbook"}]}],["$","$1","block-1",{"children":["$","p","p-5",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"This runbook is the concrete production custody sequence for PrivateDAO. It is deliberately written as a no-fake checklist: the repository can verify that the plan exists, but the authority transfer is not complete until the resulting addresses, signatures, and explorer links are recorded."}]}],["$","$1","block-2",{"children":["$","h2","h2-9",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Scope"}]}],["$","$1","block-3",{"children":["$","p","p-12",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Covered authority surfaces:"}]}],["$","$1","block-4",{"children":["$","ul","l-20",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-20-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"program upgrade authority"}],["$","li","l-20-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"DAO authority and policy administration"}],["$","li","l-20-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"treasury operator path"}],["$","li","l-20-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"token administration, if any authority remains live"}],["$","li","l-20-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"emergency pause, veto, or containment operators"}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-5",{"children":["$","h2","h2-23",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Non-Negotiable Rules"}]}],["$","$1","block-6",{"children":["$","ul","l-31",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-31-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Do not transfer production authority to an unreviewed hot wallet."}],["$","li","l-31-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Do not reuse hackathon, demo, or reviewer wallets for real-funds production custody."}],["$","li","l-31-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Do not use a multisig until the threshold, signers, recovery path, and signer roles are documented."}],["$","li","l-31-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Do not call the production mainnet blocker closed until the transfer transaction signatures are retained."}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-7",{"children":["$","h2","h2-34",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Multisig Creation Checklist"}]}],["$","$1","block-8",{"children":["$","ul","l-44",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-44-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Select the custody stack and network."}],["$","li","l-44-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Record the multisig address before moving any authority."}],["$","li","l-44-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Record the threshold, signer roles, signer hardware class, and recovery plan."}],["$","li","l-44-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Confirm every signer can independently view and approve transactions."}],["$","li","l-44-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Run a zero-value rehearsal or low-risk authority rehearsal before production transfer."}],["$","li","l-44-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Save the rehearsal signature and approval transcript in the release packet."}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-9",{"children":["$","p","p-45",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Required evidence:"}]}],"$L21","$L22","$L23","$L24","$L25","$L26","$L27","$L28","$L29","$L2a","$L2b","$L2c","$L2d","$L2e","$L2f","$L30","$L31","$L32","$L33","$L34","$L35","$L36","$L37","$L38","$L39","$L3a","$L3b","$L3c"]}]}]}]

2a:["$","$1","block-19",{"children":["$","p","p-90",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Production DAO and treasury authorities must be handled with the same discipline as program upgrade authority."}]}]
2b:["$","$1","block-20",{"children":["$","p","p-92",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Before transferring:"}]}]
2c:["$","$1","block-21",{"children":["$","ul","l-99",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-99-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"identify every DAO and treasury authority account"}],["$","li","l-99-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"verify PDA derivations and signer requirements"}],["$","li","l-99-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"verify whether authority movement requires an instruction call, governance proposal, or multisig transaction"}],["$","li","l-99-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"document the proposal or transaction that performs the transfer"}]]}]}]
2d:["$","$1","block-22",{"children":["$","p","p-100",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"After transferring:"}]}]
2e:["$","$1","block-23",{"children":["$","ul","l-108",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-108-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"read the authority state from the target account"}],["$","li","l-108-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"retain explorer links for the transfer transaction"}],["$","li","l-108-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"retain a reference URL or repo-backed file for the post-transfer readout"}],["$","li","l-108-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"update the release ceremony packet"}],["$","li","l-108-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"run a read-only operational sanity check before enabling treasury execution"}]]}]}]

32:["$","$1","block-27",{"children":["$","ul","l-123",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-123-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"timelock duration is written in the release record"}],["$","li","l-123-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"emergency veto or containment path is documented"}],["$","li","l-123-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"operators know the latest safe point to stop suspicious execution"}],["$","li","l-123-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"timelock cannot be shortened without a documented policy change"}]]}]}]
33:["$","$1","block-28",{"children":["$","h2","h2-126",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Backup And Recovery"}]}]
34:["$","$1","block-29",{"children":["$","p","p-129",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Backup does not mean copying raw private keys into a repository. It means preserving the operational ability to recover from device loss, signer absence, or role rotation without exposing secrets."}]}]
35:["$","$1","block-30",{"children":["$","p","p-131",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Required backups:"}]}]
